name: 3D-IRCADb-01 (Liver)
description: Liver surface meshes extracted from the 3D-IRCADb-01 dataset: 20 patients, including liver parenchyma, cysts, and tumours where present.
references: Soler et al. 3D image reconstruction for comparison of algorithm database. IRCAD, Strasbourg, France, Tech. Rep (2010)
